CVE-2025-43023.title: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP  ...
CVE-2025-43023.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software documentation. This potential vulnerability is due to the use of a weak code signing key, Digital Signature Algorithm (DSA).

CVE-2026-8631.title: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP  ...
CVE-2026-8631.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software. This potential vulnerability may allow escalation of privileges and/or arbitrary code execution via an integer overflow in the hpcups processing path when handling crafted print data.

CVE-2026-8632.title: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP  ...
CVE-2026-8632.description: A potential security vulnerability has been identified in the HP Linux Imaging and Printing Software. This potential vulnerability may allow escalation of privileges and/or arbitrary code execution via operating system command injection.
